name: Bvp
notes: Bessemer Venture Partners; primary HQ listed as Redwood City, CA (889 Winslow St) by PitchBook. Also has offices in San Francisco and NYC. Some sources cite San Francisco.

name: Wip

name: Stillers Soda
source: instagram.com/stillerssoda (bio: New York, NY) / fooddive.com / pitchbook.com
notes: Stiller's Soda — launched by actor Ben Stiller; better-for-you soda brand based in New York, NY.

name: Sett
notes: Sett — AI-powered creative/marketing platform for mobile game teams; HQ in Tel Aviv, Israel. Raised $57M total (Series B).

name: Andrews Mixers
notes: Andrew's Mixers — tech networking events brand founded by Andrew Yeung (ex-Google/Meta). Based in New York City; hosts events in 7+ cities.

name: Fibe
notes: Fibe (formerly EarlySalary) — consumer lending/BNPL fintech; HQ in Pune, Maharashtra, India. Raised $250M total.

name: Lorimer Ventures
notes: Lorimer Ventures — Brooklyn-based operator-led early-stage VC; 111 Kent Avenue, Brooklyn, NY. Founded 2019.

name: Rockbot
notes: Rockbot — in-store music, digital signage & TV media platform for businesses; HQ at 1625 Clay St #500, Oakland, CA 94612. Industry echoed from input (AdTech).

name: Leal 360
notes: Leal 360 (Leal Colombia SAS) — customer lifecycle marketing/loyalty platform for retail; HQ in Bogotá, Colombia.

name: Wink
notes: Wink is the flagship friend-making app by 9count Inc; HQ at 5482 Wilshire Blvd Ste 120, Los Angeles, CA 90036. Company name is 9count, app is Wink.
